title: 10 best herbal tinctures for asthma
description: Ma huang tinctures helps with asthma because it is a natural bronchodilator that opens up airways and reduces inflammation in the lungs. The active compound ephedrine works similarly to prescription medications, relaxing constricted airway muscles and allowing easier breathing. Additionally, ma huang has been shown to reduce the production of chemical mediators that contribute to asthma symptoms, such as histamine and bradykinin.
